name: Pricing Comparison Table
description: A divider-led feature × plan comparison matrix for buyers who want the full footprint visible. Cockpit density: monospaced numerals, divide-y rows, no card boxes — the featured column is signaled by a soft highlight band, not a box.

descriptions.descriptive: A four-column grid (one feature label + up to four plans) where rows are grouped under uppercase section labels. Numeric values render monospaced and right-aligned in mobile cards, left-aligned on desktop; boolean values render as a tinted check or a muted dash. The featured column gets a soft 4%-tint vertical band rather than a card border, so the table reads as one continuous comparison instead of three boxes.
descriptions.usage: Use after PricingTierCards for buyers who want the full feature footprint, or instead of cards on technical SaaS where the table is the entire pricing page. Place before FAQ. Avoid pairing with PricingTierCards as direct neighbors — they are alternative views of the same data.
descriptions.audienceFit: Procurement-led buyers, technical evaluators, and IT teams who need to confirm SSO / audit / SLA before kicking off legal. Suits B2B SaaS, infrastructure, and compliance-heavy products.
